events.name: Bayern Munich at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Thomas Müller scored twice on his 400th Bundesliga start and Harry Kane bagged his 33rd league goal of the season in a 5-1 victory at Union Berlin on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane, Müller lead Bayern 5-1 rout of Union Berlin

video.headline: Bayern Munich thrash Union Berlin 5-1 in the Bundesliga

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Bayern Munich thrash Union Berlin 5-1 in the Bundesliga) 2024/04/20 US ONLY
